business.name: Plumbing Heating Solutions Midlands Ltd
business.tagline: Reliable Heating Solutions Across the Midlands

contact.address: First Floor, Unit 11, Middlemore Rd, Birmingham B66 2DZ

sample_reviews.author: Mark T
sample_reviews.text: Fantastic service from start to finish. The engineer arrived on time, diagnosed the issue quickly and had our heating back up and running the same day. Highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah K
sample_reviews.text: Very professional team. They installed a brand new central heating system in our home and the whole job was clean, tidy and completed within the timeframe quoted. Will definitely use again.

sample_reviews.author: Dave R
sample_reviews.text: Reliable and honest company. Gave us a fair quote and stuck to it. The engineer was knowledgeable and took the time to explain everything. Good local business.

brand.usp: We deliver expert central heating installation, servicing and repairs across Birmingham and the wider Midlands — combining qualified craftsmanship with honest, transparent pricing on every job.
brand.hero_headline: Expert Heating Solutions for Birmingham Homes
brand.about_paragraph: We're Plumbing Heating Solutions Midlands Ltd, a Birmingham-based heating specialist serving homeowners and landlords across the West Midlands. Our Gas Safe registered engineers bring years of hands-on experience to every job, whether it's a routine boiler service or a full central heating installation. We pride ourselves on arriving on time, working cleanly, and giving you straightforward advice without the jargon.
